Again, I'm not recalling any major jazz artists named Vincent. Maybe a lesser-known one, but not someone like Louis or Miles Davis. Option D is Gwen. Gwen is a female name. I'm trying to think if there's a famous jazz musician named Gwen. Maybe Gwen Stefani? But she's a pop singer, not jazz. I don't think so. Option E is James. James is a common first name. There are many musicians with the first name James, but I'm not sure if any are particularly famous specifically in jazz. Maybe James Brown, but he's a soul and funk musician, not jazz. There's also James Moody, a jazz saxophonist. But I'm not certain if he's as well-known as Louis Armstrong.
